## Problem this solves
What problem or limitation does this feature address?

## Proposed solution
Describe what you want m1frame to do.

## Which pillar does this affect?
- [ ] BMAD (story backlog)
- [ ] Council (brainstorm / review)
- [ ] Miras (orchestration)
- [ ] Karpathy (CoT refinement)
- [ ] LLM Wiki (knowledge graph)
- [ ] LLM Client (backend adapter)
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought of.

## Additional context
Links, examples, or prior art.
